rationale: The proposed change to the homestead exemption amount under §11.13(b) has no relationship to §11.32, which governs optional exemptions for water conservation, desalination, and brush control initiatives by taxing units.
quote: The governing body of a taxing unit by official action of the governing body adopted in the manner required by law for official actions may exempt from taxation part or all of the assessed value of property on which approved water conservation initiatives, desalination projects, or brush control initiatives have been implemented.
_note: No conflict; §11.32 addresses an unrelated optional exemption category and does not reference the homestead exemption or §11.13.
